# --include filters categories on the wire (StreamEvents). Requires --follow:
# AgentLogsRequest carries no Include field, so without --follow we'd silently
# drop after the daemon shipped everything. Reject up front.

mockd start
agentctl logs --follow --include lifecycle agent-x &follow&
mockd push lifecycle exit {"exit_code":0}
mockd push agent stdout {"line":"should-not-appear"}
mockd end
wait follow
stdout 'lifecycle.exit'
! stdout 'agent.stdout'
mockd assert-method-called StreamEvents
